_note: Reconstructed Mastodon pilot input (the original run-008 artifacts were never persisted; the SDK's mastodon o11y tests use inline synthetic _meta). metrics._declared_note: Mastodon's Ruby prometheus_exporter emits these opt-in DETAILED series (#293/#300), separate from the traces-only OTel path. Empty-valued labels (method/status) are DIMENSIONS, not pins (#300 defect A). Exercises: A (empty-label selector), B (availability error_selector must not duplicate the status matcher).

Sidekiq's queue GAUGES (#300 defects C/D). sidekiq_queue_latency is a gauge covering latency — must bind as a gauge, NOT a histogram _bucket (C). sidekiq_queue_size covers saturation — not a base-RED kind, so it must surface as a deferred_declared_kinds gap, not vanish (D).
